critical_finding.detail: ALL 13 applied rules show times_correct=0. Root cause: AB_TRACKER code gap means outcome callbacks never fire — times_applied increments during simulation, times_correct never updates. hype_short_veto_v1: applied=3, correct=0 (these are simulation evaluations, NOT real trade outcomes — veto still valid based on 239-trade base evidence). No rule performance data can be trusted until AB_TRACKER code (~4h dev) is implemented.
